name: indian-stock-market-mcp
description: Indian Stock Market MCP Server — Live NSE/BSE stock prices, portfolio tracker, stock screener, crypto prices, and market summary. Free Yahoo Finance data, no API key needed.
author: TRIKAAL

tools.name: get_price
tools.description: Get live price for any NSE/BSE stock (RELIANCE, TCS, INFY, etc.)

tools.name: get_history
tools.description: Get historical OHLCV data for any stock (1d to 10y)

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Get company fundamentals: sector, market cap, PE, PB, dividend yield, EPS

tools.name: get_top_gainers
tools.description: Get top gaining stocks on NSE today

tools.name: get_top_losers
tools.description: Get top losing stocks on NSE today

tools.name: get_portfolio
tools.description: Calculate portfolio value, P&L, and weights for your holdings

tools.name: screen_stocks
tools.description: Screen 50 NSE stocks by PE ratio, sector, dividend yield

tools.name: get_crypto_price
tools.description: Get cryptocurrency price in INR (BTC, ETH, SOL, etc.)

tools.name: get_market_summary
tools.description: Get Nifty 50, Sensex, and market breadth

tools.name: search_stock
tools.description: Search for stocks by name or symbol
